creator: bkoenig@alpha-tierchen.de
text:
Do you have set a hostname?

Please
make clean configure && tar -cjf work.tbz work
and send the tarball to me for further investigation.

Thanks and best regards
Björn

P.S. It works on my amd64-portbld-freebsd8.1 machine.
